titleStmt.title: SII 20.215: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 215. (B.K. No. 44 of 1937-38.) AGARKHĒḌ, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed into the wall of the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 1170, Kīlaka, Jyēshtha, Pū0rṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse. In the given year there were two Jyēshṭhas, adhika and nija, and the lunar eclipse fell on the Pūrṇimā of nija-Jyēshṭha, which was a Sunday and not Monday. The latter tithi corresponds to A.D. 1248, June 7. The inscription seems to record a gift of land to Jaina ascetic of Dēsi-gaṇa, made in the presence of the Mahājanas of agrahāra Khēḍa and others of that place. The details of the gift are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ nama śivāya namaḥ . śrī
maḥ śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁ
chanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanātha sya śāsanaṁ jinaśā
sanaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pri
thvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ
varādhīsparaṁ siṁdinapuravarādhīsvaraṁ śrīmatu yā
davanārāyaṇa pratāpabhujabaḷacrakava
rtti śrī kaṁhnaradēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
saluttamire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyā
nadhāraṇamaunnānuṣṭhāna
nāgnihōtradvijagurudēvatāpūjātutapa
raruṁ yajanayājana yadhyayanayadhyāpa
na dānapratigrahaśaṭukarmmaniratarumappa śrī
matu piriyagrahāraṁ khēḍada Aśēṣamahājana
ṁgaḷu sakavarusaṁ sāsirada nūṟayeppattaneya kī
laka saṁvatsarada jēṣṭa sudha paurṇnamāse sōmavāra
sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu Aśēṣamahājanaṁ
gaḷu maṁneyaru prabhugaḷuveṁṭuhiṭṭu sthānamā
na mukhyarāgi halasūra dēsigaṇada yiṁgaḷē
svarada baḷi pāriśvadēvarige taṁma teṁka dali
māṇikēsvara mattaru
seṭṭiyaru
yaru Āsthānadā
ryya ladēvarige Ā ṇext few lines are indistinct.
Digital edition of SII 20.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
